headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://apis.google.com https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com https://*.googleusercontent.com https://images.unsplash.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.analytics.google.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com; object-src 'none';
